basic_details.job_title: CSIR Madras Complex Junior Research Fellows Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: CSIR Madras Complex has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 2 Junior Research Fellows (JRF's) Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. with GATE/NET qualification in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electronics Engineering, or Computer Science Engineering OR M.E./M.Tech. Degree in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering, or allied specializations. qualification can directly attend the interview on 21 July 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 28 years. Age relaxations: 5 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Female candidates and 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer) candidates.

qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech. Degree with GATE/NET qualification in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electronics Engineering, or Computer Science Engineering from a recognized University. M.E./M.Tech. Degree in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering, or allied specializations thereof from a recognized University. Knowledge and/or experience in NIR spectroscopy, optical instrumentation, computer vision, image processing, machine learning. Python programming, embedded systems, electronic hardware development, data analytics, software development, and prototype realisation.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month + 30% HRA Duration: Initially for Six months and likely to be extendable till the duration of the project.

content_sections.heading: CSIR Madras Complex Junior Research Fellows (JRF's) Recruitment 2026 - Overview
CSIR Madras Complex Junior Research Fellows (JRF's) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR Madras Complex Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSIR Madras Complex Junior Research Fellows (JRF's) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR Madras Complex Junior Research Fellows (JRF's) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B.E./B.Tech. Degree with GATE/NET qualification in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electronics Engineering, or Computer Science Engineering from a recognized University. M.E./M.Tech. Degree in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering, or allied specializations thereof from a recognized University. Knowledge and/or experience in NIR spectroscopy, optical instrumentation, computer vision, image processing, machine learning. Python programming, embedded systems, electronic hardware development, data analytics, software development, and prototype realisation.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit is 28 years. Age relaxations: 5 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Female candidates and 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer) candidates.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- per month + 30% HRA Duration: Initially for Six months and likely to be extendable till the duration of the project.

content_sections.heading: CSIR Madras Complex Junior Research Fellows (JRF's) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR Madras Complex Junior Research Fellows (JRF's) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: CSIR Madras Complex Junior Research Fellows (JRF's) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the CSIR Madras Complex recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the CSIR Madras Complex recruitment is Junior Research Fellows (JRF's).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for JRFs?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Junior Research Fellows (JRF's) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech. with GATE/NET qualification or an M.E./M.Tech. Degree in relevant engineering fields.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 28 years, with relaxations for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellows?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive Rs. 37,000/- per month plus 30% HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q7. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 21st July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to bring original and attested copies of qualification, age, community certificates, and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the CSIR Madras Complex?
faq.answer: The CSIR Madras Complex is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
